title: iodanthus pinnatifidus
intro: Iodanthus pinnatifidus, also known as Frasera pinnatifida, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the mountainous regions of western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antimicrobial properties. Iodanthus pinnatifidus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to make salves and topical creams for skin conditions.
